feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Request for BAPI to Enhance Inbound Delivery Validation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We would like to implement an enhancement in the S/4HANA inbound delivery process and would appreciate your guidance on the appropriate BAPI that can be used to make changes to inbound deliveries.

The business requirement is to prevent duplicate vendor invoice numbers during inbound delivery creation. Specifically, if a user enters a vendor invoice number that has already been maintained for another inbound delivery, the system should validate the entry and trigger an error message, preventing the creation or saving of the duplicate record.

Could you please advise on the suitable BAPI or enhancement framework that can be used to implement this validation?

Thank you in advance for your support.

BR,

Abhishek

entry.title: API PRODHIERPRODS_0001 – POST returns ;Create operations are disabled for association;
entry.content:
We are trying to assign a Product to Product Hierarchy assignment using the Create (POST) operation provided by API PRODHIERPRODS_0001.

According to the API documentation, the POST operation is exposed for the entity and the payload structure follows the sample payload provided in SAP API Business Hub.

However, every POST request returns an error indicating that create operations are disabled for the association _PRODUNIVHIERNORMALNODE.

Request Payload {
"HierarchyNode": "0SNHCISSUE00",
"Product": "TEST_PROD_107",
"HierarchyType": "MD01",
"_ProdUnivHierNormalNode": {
"ProdUnivHierarchy": "MEDIAHIERARCHY",
"HierarchyNode": "0SNHCISSUE00",
"ProdHierarchyValidityEndDate": "9999-12-31",
"ProdHierarchyValidityStartDate": "2026-01-01",
"ParentN

entry.title: Materials not showing up in Maintenance Order Reports
entry.content: Materials not showing up in Maintenance Order Reports

entry.title: Issue with Failed Mail Trace in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
If there is any application to check whether the email sent via SAP has reached its destination or not.

Using the “Monitor Email Transmission” app, it is displaying the status as Sent for both valid and invalid email addresses.

Is there any way to capture invalid or non-existent email addresses?

entry.title: Request for BADI to Enhance Inbound Delivery Validation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We would like to implement an enhancement in the S/4HANA inbound delivery process and would appreciate your guidance on the appropriate BADI that can be used to make changes to inbound deliveries.

The business requirement is to prevent duplicate vendor invoice numbers during inbound delivery creation. Specifically, if a user enters a vendor invoice number that has already been maintained for another inbound delivery, the system should validate the entry and trigger an error message, preventing the creation or saving of the duplicate record.

Could you please advise on the suitable BADI or enhancement framework that can be used to implement this validation?

Thank you in advance for your support.

BR,

Abhishek

entry.title: Mass update of delivery schedule prices after modify info record price
entry.content: Hi, I have a scheduling agreement in the test environment, number 5500000029 with 5 line items. The validity date is consistent. I changed the price of info record 5300004060. However, when running the job for the program 'Determine and Update Price of Contract Item', the price does not update. In the first run, it updated the price of the second line item, but incorrectly entered '2' (while the info record price was 3.14). Why is it not working? Is this a bug or am I missing a step? Or maybe I'm not using the right program. Is there another one that does this?

entry.title: Supplier Confirmation Dunning is not being sent
entry.content:
Hello,

we are currently facing the problem that the Supplier Confirmation Dunning is not being sent. But all conditions are fulfilled to send it. This happens occasionally.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Material Type DIEN in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

I am configured for material type now, but I can't find material type "DIEN" in system. 
Do I lack of any configure/scope, so I cannot find it? Or material type DIEN has already alternated by material type SERV?

 

Tina

entry.title: Depreciation keys for the assets
entry.content:
Can you create these following Depreciation Keys for the assets:

•    Depreciation key of 5.50% (with a 50% reduction for the first year only)
•    Depreciation key of 1% (with a 50% reduction for the first year only)
•    Depreciation key of 5.56%
•    Depreciation key of 20%

entry.title: AI and Joule Upskilling Guidance for SAP Functional Consultants
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The topics listed below are related to AI and Joule and are highly relevant to SAP Functional Consultants. Could you please share recommended learning paths, course links, blogs, or documentation that provide step-by-step guidance, configuration details, and structured learning approaches for these areas?

I am particularly interested in learning about -

Generative AI (LLMs, embeddings, and vector databases)

Agentic AI (multi-agent systems, planning, and reasoning)

AI lifecycle management

Machine Learning algorithms (supervised and unsupervised learning)

Neural networks

Natural Language Processing (NLP)

Prompt engineering

AI evaluation frameworks

Any resources, learning roadmaps, hands-on tutorials, or SAP-specific guidance that can help build knowledge and practical expertise in these topics would be greatly appreciated.

Additionally, please consider both SAP Public Cloud and Private Cloud environments when sharing resources and guidance related to the above topics.

Thank you in advance for your support and recommendations.

Best regards,
Ashish

entry.title: Possible issue in Alternative Account Determination after renumbering YCOA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have recently performed a renumbering of the YCOA  in our SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.

My concern is related to the impact this renumbering might have on the Alternative Account Determination.

As you can see in the screenshot below, the accounts have changed from their original numbers to new ones after the renumbering:

Will the existing configuration in Alternative Account Determination still work as expected with the new account numbers?

Do we need to review or adjust the mappings manually after the renumbering process?

When going into the Manage Chart of Accounts app and opening YCPT (which in our case is the alternative chart of accounts for Portugal), the list appears empty. However, when navigating to G/L Account Master Data, the accounts are there.

Two questions from this:

  1. If we post normal journal entries using the primary YCOA and then filter by alternative account, could we run into issues given that YCPT appears empty in the Manage Chart of Accounts app?
  2. When running statutory reports such as SAF-T, financial statements, VAT, and balance sheets - could the alternative account mapping cause problems here, or will the reports still work correctly regardless of YCPT appearing empty in that view?

Any insights or experiences on this topic would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: "Post Revaluation" Function Availability & Documentation Gap
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We are reaching out because we have received guidance from SAP OSS that conflicts with what we observe in our system, and we have been unable to find any official documentation to clarify the situation. We would greatly appreciate input from community members who may have encountered the same issue.

Issue 1: "Post Revaluation" function stated as currently unavailable We received the following response from SAP OSS: "What I mean is that 'Post Revaluation' is not yet available and will be a functional improvement in the future. If you want to do the Revaluation Posting, please use the 'Other Transactions' option."

The "Post Revaluation" menu item is visible in our Fixed Asset Management menu in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. We expected this menu item to be a fully functional feature. However, OSS has informed us that it is not yet available and is planned as a future enhancement. This is unexpected, as the menu item is present in the system without any visible restriction or warning.

Issue 2: No documentation found to support this restriction We have searched SAP Help Portal, SAP Notes, and KBA databases, but we cannot find any official documentation that:

  • States that "Post Revaluation" is currently unavailable or restricted in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Confirms that "Other Transactions" is the officially recommended workaround for revaluation posting
  • Provides a planned release timeline for when "Post Revaluation" will become fully functional

The absence of documentation makes it very difficult to justify the use of a workaround internally, or to plan for when the standard function will be available.

Our Questions:

  1. Is there an official SAP Note or KBA that confirms the current unavailability of the "Post Revaluation" function in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? If so, could you please share the Note/KBA number?
  2. Is "Other Transactions" the officially supported and recommended workaround for revaluation posting at this time? Are there any known limitations or caveats when using this approach?
  3. Is there a planned release timeline for when "Post Revaluation" will become fully available? Which release version is it targeted for?
  4. Why is this limitation not documented in SAP Help Portal or other official SAP publications? If this is a Cloud-specific restriction, should it not be clearly stated in the product documentation?

We would appreciate a clear and direct response to each of the above questions, as we need official written confirmation to proceed with our internal processes and planning.

Thank you for your support.

##FI-A
##Fixed Asset Accountin
##asset-revaluatio
##post-revaluatio
##fixed-assets

entry.title: 最新的公有云版本是否支持内部订单？
entry.content:
Hello experts,

之前的公有云版本不支持内部订单，但听说最新的版本已经开始支持了， 这是真的吗 

请大家帮忙证实下，谢谢！

 

-Zhang

entry.title: SAP Certification Recommendations for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Professional Services Consultant
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently working as an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Consultant, primarily focusing on the Professional Services area, including project management, resource management, staffing, timesheets, customer projects, billing, revenue recognition, and related end-to-end business processes.

I am planning to pursue an SAP certification and would appreciate guidance from the community on the most suitable certification path.

Could you please advise on the following:

Which SAP certification is most relevant for consultants working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Professional Services?

Are there any certifications specifically focused on Professional Services or Project-Based Services in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Would it be better to pursue a broader certification such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant, or are there more specialized certifications available?

What learning resources, training courses, or learning journeys would you recommend for preparation?

For those already certified, how valuable has the certification been in terms of project opportunities and career growth?

Any recommendations, certification paths, or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

entry.title: KO020 "open down payments" blocks CLSD on investment WBS even though down payment is fully cleared
entry.content:
Title: KO020 "open down payments" blocks CLSD on investment WBS even though down payment is fully cleared — and do we actually need CLSD?

Hi experts,

Environment: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Company Code 1510 (JP), Scope Item 35F (Capital Projects).

I'm running an investment project (I.00001) with two WBS elements:

- WBS I.000011 (equipment procurement, ~JPY 2,000,000): PO with down payment terms → 2 down payment requests → 2 down payment payments → GR → supplier invoice with the 2 down payment requests applied on the "Down Payment Clearing" tab → automatic payment run covering the invoice + 2 down payment items together (3 line items).
- WBS I.000012 (equipment installation, ~JPY 500,000): supplier invoice without PO reference (direct cost posting).

For both WBS, periodic AuC settlement and final settlement to the final asset (20000006-0) are done. Final settlement via F3767 (processing type Automatic) ran with 0 errors; the asset is capitalized and depreciating. The down payment clearing is posted (down payment G/L account 12110000 balance = 0).

The problem: when I set the WBS to CLSD, I get

KO020 "There are still open down payments for WBS I.000011"

This happens ONLY on I.000011 (the WBS that had down payments). I.000012 has no issue. I've checked supplier open items and the down payment G/L balance — nothing open that I can find.

Two questions:

1. Has anyone seen KO020 persist after the down payment is fully cleared in Public Edition? Is there a residual down-payment record at WBS/order level (not visible in the standard clearing apps) that I need to deal with, and how?

2. More fundamentally — do we actually need to set CLSD at all? My understanding is that capitalization and depreciation work fine in TECO, and CLSD is only the financial-close status that's a prerequisite for archiving. If we just leave the project in TECO, is there any real downside (reporting, period-end, audit, etc.)? Or is CLSD genuinely required for an investment project that's been fully capitalized?

Thanks in advance for any pointers.

entry.title: Difference between Scrap in Material Master/BOM and Operation Scrap in Routing
entry.content:
I am currently working on a PP (Production Planning) implementation and trying to deeply understand the system's behavior regarding scrap calculations in MRP.
Could someone please explain the precise differences and best practices for using the following three types of scrap in SAP S/4HANA?
Assembly Scrap / Component Scrap (defined in Material Master or BOM)
Operation Scrap (defined in Routing)
Specifically, I would like to know:
How does MRP handle each type of scrap when calculating dependent requirements? (Does it simply multiply the percentage, or does it calculate backwards sequentially based on operations?)
What is the recommended business scenario for using Routing-level scrap versus BOM-level scrap? (e.g., material-specific defects vs. process-specific defects)
Any insights, documentation links, or real-world examples would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Analytical Query Inquiry
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I have a concern regarding the result I am getting.

First, I joined PurchaseOrderItem (POForStoreOrderSummary) with MaterialDocumentItem2.



When I check the data using Customer Data Browser, I get the following results:

  • Goods Movement Type 643 = 10 quantity
  • Goods Movement Type 101 = 4 × 1 = 4 quantity

 

In the Analytical Query, I applied the following filters:

  • Goods Issue = 643
  • Goods Receipt = 101

However, I am having an issue with the result because the Goods Issue quantity is showing as 14.



Could you please help me understand why the Goods Issue quantity includes the quantity from Goods Movement Type 101?

Thank you.

entry.title: NEW COMPANY CODE CREATION WITH DIFFERANT CURRENCY IN SAME INSTANCE
entry.content: NEW COMPANY CODE CREATION WITH DIFFERANT CURRENCY AND COUNTRY CODE IN SAME INSTANCE. DIFFERANT TAX PROCEDURE IS ALSO APPLICABLE. PRESENTLY THE SYSTEM IS LIVE WITH INDIA AS COUNTRY AND GST AS TAXATIO AND INR AS CURRENCY. WE REQUIRE ANOTHER CONPANY TO CREATE WITH COUNTRY UAE, CURRENCY AED AND TAXATION AS VAT. WE HAVE NOT ACTIVATED GROUYP REPORTING IN PRIMARY IMPLEMENTATION.

entry.title: NEW COMPANY CODE CREATION WITH DIFFERANT CURRENCY IN SAME INSTANCE
entry.content: NEW COMPANY CODE CREATION WITH DIFFERANT CURRENCY, COUNTRY AND TAX CODE, IN SAME INSTANCE. THERE IS ALREADY A COMPANY CODE EXISTS WITH COUNTRY=INDIA, CURRENCY=INR, TAXATION=GST. WE NEED TO ADD ANOTHER COMPANY CODE WITH COUNTRY=UAE, CURRENCY=INR, TAXATION=VAT.

entry.title: New output type for Delivery
entry.content:
Hello all.

does anybody know if it is possible to create new output type for delivery (copy of DELIVERY_NOTE)? I am facing the issue when I need to send data to external system through the EDI because of printing of labels. Therefore I used ouput DELIVERY_NOTE but I also need to send ASN (output DELIEVERY_NOTE through the EDI) to  the customer and I am not sure how to do it?

I would like to have something like

DELIVERY_NOTE - ASN (EDI)

Z_DELIVERY_NOTE - Data for Printing labels (EDI) 

Thank you
